content.title: Your 6-month journey

phases.title: Find your direction
bullets: Choose target country and level (MS, PhD, or both)
Understand the systems (US, Taiwan, Korea, Japan, Europe)
Build a funding and scholarship strategy
phases.outcome: a direction report and a target list of schools, labs, and professors.

phases.title: Build your application
phases.body: Academic CV, SOP, self-introduction, interview prep, and presenting your research interest with confidence.
phases.outcome: CV and SOP drafts, which unlock your 1:1 matching.

notes: Office Hours and 1:1 with Ambassadors: book once you have a CV / SOP, a target list, and 3 to 5 specific questions.
Throughout: VISEMI tracks progress and coordinates workshops, deadlines, and Fellow-Ambassador matching.
